home_pill: 🏙️ Game city on the MafiaControl platform • since 2015
home_lead: Build your own mafia city, expand your empire, join a family and compete against other players.
announcement_text: The official Mafia Hunterss website is now online and the Android application is available for download.
feature_city_text: Every player builds their own mafia city after registration.
feature_economy_text: Earn money, expand your facilities and strengthen your position.
feature_families_text: Join other players and create a powerful mafia family.
feature_competition_text: Fight for respect and prove who rules the underworld.
feature_languages_text: Czech, English, German, Polish and Slovak.
feature_android_text: Play comfortably using the Android application.
available_languages_text: Mafia Hunterss is aimed at both Czech and international players.
footer_about: Mafia Hunterss is a game city running on the MafiaControl platform. Every player builds their own mafia city and expands their empire.
footer_project_text: Official website of the game city.
